pr.title: feat: add --include/--exclude to bench eval create + address PR #347 review findings
pr.body: ## Summary Three changes in this PR: **ENG-159: CLI `--include` / `--exclude` flags** - Adds `--include` and `--exclude` repeatable flags to `bench eval create` - Wires them into `EvaluationConfig.include_tasks` / `exclude_tasks` across all three batch code paths (`--config`, `--source-repo`, `--tasks-dir`) - CLI flags override YAML values when both are provided; without CLI flags, YAML values are preserved - Example: `bench eval create --source-repo benchflow-ai/skillsbench --include jax-computing-basics --include data-to-d3 --exclude quantum-numerical-simulation` - `include_tasks` / `exclude_tasks` already existed in `EvaluationConfig` and `Evaluation.from_yaml` but were unreachable from the CLI **PR #347 thermo-nuclear review finding 1: Move `tomli_w` to core deps** - `model_dump_toml()` in `TaskConfig` is production code, but `tomli_w` was only in `[project.optional-dependencies] dev` - Moved to `[project] dependencies` so it's always available at runtime (6.7 KB, zero transitive deps) **PR #347 thermo-nuclear review finding 2: Deterministic mtime tiebreaker** - Changed `_latest_result_entries_by_task` comparison from `mtime >= previous[0]` to `(mtime, str(rfile)) >= (previous[0], str(previous[1]))` - Equal-mtime ties now resolve deterministically by path instead of depending on iteration order ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Run `bench eval create --tasks-dir --include ` and confirm only the included task runs - [ ] Run `bench eval create --config --include ` and confirm CLI flag overrides YAML - [ ] Verify `tomli_w` installs correctly as a core dep: `pip install -e .` in a clean venv, then `python -c "from benchflow.task.config import TaskConfig"` - [ ] Full test suite: `uv run python -m pytest tests -q` → expect 1827 passed, 38 skipped, 0 failed ### Notes - 4 new tests in `TestEvalCreateIncludeExclude` covering: tasks-dir batch, config override, config preservation, CliRunner end-to-end - ruff, ty, and full pytest suite all pass locally - The `--include`/`--exclude` flags are ignored for single-task runs (when `tasks_dir` points to a dir with `task.toml`) — this matches the existing behavior where `include_tasks` only filters batch discovery Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/d30db77671094a719a2d951dde637750 Requested by: @xdotli ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
